items.title: CSK vs MI: IPL's iconic rivals fast approaching must-win territory
items.summary: The two teams will yet again be without their former captains who defined IPL's 'El Clasico' - MS Dhoni and Rohit Sharma
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Championship marathon ends with final-day sprint - who will finish second?
items.summary: Ipswich Town, Millwall and Middlesbrough battle for promotion to the Premier League on the final day of the season.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Cardinals are NFL's longest long shots to make the playoffs
items.summary: The dust has settled on the 2026 NFL draft, and perceptions around the Cardinals haven't changed: They're the longest long shots to make the playoffs in the NFL.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
